files.net_price_format: double[59986052]; net_price[i] = l_extendedprice[i] * (1.0 - l_discount[i]); all rows valid

storage_extensions.usage: mmap net_price.bin; in main_scan use net_price[i] as the revenue contribution (instead of computing l_extendedprice[i]*(1.0-l_discount[i])). Do NOT mmap l_extendedprice.bin or l_discount.bin — they are replaced by this column entirely.

join_order.notes: bool qualifying_cust[1500001] indexed directly by c_custkey value (~1.5MB L3-resident). Built inside fused parallel region with #pragma omp for schedule(static); non-overlapping custkey range writes per thread (c_custkey sorted ascending).

join_order.build: orders(filtered: o_orderdate < 8015 AND o_custkey in qualifying_cust)
join_order.notes: combined_map (2M slots × 16B = 32MB, 64 partitions × 32768 slots). 4MB blocked bloom filter reduced to 4 probes per key (down from 8). Revenue from precomputed net_price[i].

filters.index_note: break early when zone_min[b] >= kOrderDateMax (orders sorted ascending by o_orderdate)
compute shared_li_first_block = first b where zone_max[b] > kShipdateMin; Phase 3 loops from [shared_li_first_block, shared_li_nb) skipping the ~294 fully-dead blocks entirely

scan.prefetch: mmap_prefetch_all on l_orderkey, l_shipdate, l_net_price, plus orders and customer columns at startup

data_structures.customer_filter: bool qualifying_cust[1500001] indexed directly by c_custkey value; ~1.5MB; L3-resident; parallel-built (c_custkey sorted ascending → non-overlapping custkey range per thread, no atomics)
data_structures.combined_map: 2,097,152 (2^21) CombinedSlot entries, 16 bytes each = 32MB. CombinedSlot: {int32_t key (sentinel=0), int16_t orderdate, int8_t shippriority, uint8_t _pad, double revenue} alignas(16). Allocate with aligned_alloc(64, COMBINED_CAP*sizeof(CombinedSlot)) — NOT calloc. Phase 2b explicitly memsets each 512KB partition before inserting, so calloc zero-init is redundant. 64 partitions × 32768 slots. Partition = hash32(key) & 63; within-partition start = (hash32(key) >> 6) & 32767. CRITICAL: do NOT call free(combined_map) anywhere in the timed path or cleanup — let the OS reclaim it on process exit (avoids munmap TLB shootdown on 64 cores for 32MB of faulted pages).
data_structures.mini_pool: Single flat malloc: OrdRow* mini_pool = malloc(MAXTHREADS * NUM_PARTS * MINI_CAP * sizeof(OrdRow)) where MINI_CAP=1024. int32_t* pool_cnt = calloc(pool_bufs, sizeof(int32_t)). Total size: 64*64*1024*8 = 32MB. CRITICAL: do NOT call free(mini_pool) or free(pool_cnt) anywhere — the omp single block after Phase 2b must be EMPTY or removed entirely. Calling munmap(32MB) inside omp single causes a TLB shootdown across all 64 cores (~5-10ms) while all threads wait at the implicit barrier. Let the OS reclaim on exit.
data_structures.bloom_filter: uint8_t bloom[4194304] (4MB, aligned 64B). 65536 blocks × 64B = 1 cache-line per block (512 bits/block). REDUCED TO 4 PROBES (down from 8): use only 4 multiplier primes for 4 bit positions per key. FP rate = (1 - e^(-4*1470000/33554432))^4 ≈ 0.07% — of 27M non-matching rows only ~19K false positives reach combined_map, still negligible. bloom_set_atomic: 4 probes. bloom_check: 4 probes with early-exit. Allocate with aligned_alloc. CRITICAL: do NOT call free(bloom) — let OS reclaim on process exit.

parallelism.structure: Maintain single fused #pragma omp parallel region from iter_4. Key changes: (1) Remove free(mini_pool)/free(pool_cnt) from inside the omp single after Phase 2b — replace the entire omp single block with an empty placeholder or remove it; leave pool memory alive. (2) Phase 3 loops from shared_li_first_block (not 0) to shared_li_nb with schedule(static) instead of schedule(dynamic,1).

fused_region_layout.dim_filter: #pragma omp for schedule(static): divide 1500000 customer rows into nthreads equal chunks; each thread writes to non-overlapping qualifying_cust[] range. Implicit barrier at end of for.
fused_region_layout.single_setup: #pragma omp single { (a) compute shared_last_ord_block by scanning orders_zm.zm_min until zone_min[b] >= kOrderDateMax; (b) compute shared_li_nb and shared_li_bs; (c) compute shared_li_first_block = first b in [0, shared_li_nb) where lineitem_zm.zm_max[b] > kShipdateMin (the first block with at least one qualifying row). } Implicit barrier.
fused_region_layout.phase_2a_collect: #pragma omp for schedule(dynamic,1) over orders blocks [0..shared_last_ord_block). For each qualifying row: scatter OrdRow to flat mini_pool[(tid*NUM_PARTS+part)*MINI_CAP + pool_cnt[...]++]. Implicit barrier.
fused_region_layout.phase_2b_insert_bloom: #pragma omp for schedule(static) over 64 partitions (1 per thread). (a) memset 512KB partition (pre-faults pages + zeros for SLOT_SENT). (b) insert all mini_pool entries for this partition from all nthreads source threads via linear probe (no contention). (c) bloom_set_atomic with 4 probes for each inserted key. Store key last with ATOMIC_RELEASE. Implicit barrier.
fused_region_layout.no_free_after_phase_2b: CRITICAL CHANGE from iter_4: the '#pragma omp single { free(mini_pool); free(pool_cnt); }' block is REMOVED. Do not free mini_pool or pool_cnt. The memory is no longer accessed after Phase 2b but munmap on 32MB causes a TLB shootdown across 64 cores while all threads wait — costing ~5-10ms. Remove the omp single block entirely; the implicit barrier from Phase 2b already synchronizes all threads before Phase 3.
fused_region_layout.phase_3_main_scan: #pragma omp for schedule(static) over lineitem blocks [shared_li_first_block..shared_li_nb). CHANGED from schedule(dynamic,1) over [0..li_nb): (a) start from shared_li_first_block — skips the ~294 fully-dead leading blocks entirely (no zone_max check needed for most blocks, just per-row check for partial blocks near boundary); (b) static schedule — active blocks are ~306 contiguous uniform full blocks (100K rows each), 306/64 ≈ 4.8 per thread, near-perfect load balance; lower scheduler overhead than dynamic. Still apply per-row shipdate check for partial blocks (where zone_min[b] <= kShipdateMin). For each qualifying row: (a) compute hv=hash32(l_orderkey[i]); (b) 4-probe bloom_check (1 cache-line + 4 bit tests) — if miss continue; (c) probe combined_map partition (ATOMIC_ACQUIRE key load, linear probe); (d) CAS-add net_price[i] to slot->revenue. Implicit barrier.
fused_region_layout.parallel_region_end: All threads exit. Do NOT free bloom here. bloom, combined_map, mini_pool, pool_cnt are all skipped in cleanup — OS reclaims on exit.

parallelism.output_phase: SEPARATE (outside fused region): #pragma omp parallel for schedule(static) over 64 partitions, thread-local top-10 heap. Single-threaded merge of 64×10 candidates → final top-10 → sort → CSV. Output excluded from timing_ms. Do NOT free combined_map after output — let OS handle.

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks — break early when zone_min[b] >= kOrderDateMax (orders sorted ascending)
skip_blocks — compute first active block (shared_li_first_block) in single_setup; Phase 3 starts from there; still apply per-row check for partial boundary blocks

aggregation: Direct atomic CAS accumulation into combined_map slot->revenue (union double/uint64_t). Key = l_orderkey (uniquely identifies group). Revenue value = net_price[i] from precomputed extension. No separate aggregation phase.

output.strategy: Parallel scan of combined_map (64 threads × 1 partition each = 512KB per thread), thread-local top-10 heap (padded LocalTop10 struct, 256B). Single-threaded merge of 640 candidates → sort_heap → CSV write.

optimization_notes: Two independent bottlenecks identified in iter_4's 55ms: (1) Category C (work elimination) — free(mini_pool, 32MB) inside #pragma omp single after Phase 2b calls munmap(32MB) which triggers TLB shootdown IPIs to all 64 cores; with MAXTHREADS=64 this costs roughly 5-10ms while all threads wait at the implicit omp single barrier. Similarly, free(combined_map, 32MB) after the output phase (still within timing_ms = total - output) incurs another ~5-10ms TLB shootdown. Since this is a short-lived query binary that exits immediately after writing results, these frees are unnecessary — the OS reclaims all process memory on exit without per-page TLB invalidation. Removing free(mini_pool), free(pool_cnt) from inside the omp single and removing free(combined_map)/free(bloom) from cleanup eliminates ~10-20ms of TLB overhead. (2) Category C (work elimination) — bloom filter uses 8 hash probes per row for 30M rows in Phase 3: 8 x hash32(key*prime_j) ~ 24ns/row x 30M / 64 threads ~ 11ms of compute. Reducing to 4 probes cuts this to ~6ms (FP rate rises from 0.018% to 0.07%, adding ~19K extra combined_map probes out of 27M non-matching rows — negligible). (3) Category A (plan restructuring) — Phase 3 computed shared_li_first_block in single_setup and loop from there with schedule(static), skipping the ~294 leading dead blocks and switching from dynamic to static scheduling for the contiguous 306-block active range (near-perfect load balance, lower overhead). Combined expected improvement: ~15-25ms, targeting timing_ms of 30-40ms.
